LightningComponentBundle.description: Primary action button component with save icon positioned on the left. Implements SLDS 2 brand styling with proper spacing, hover, focus, and active states. Ensures WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance with semantic HTML and ARIA attributes.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Primary Action Button With Save Icon

property.name: isDisabled
property.label: Disabled
property.description: Controls whether the button is disabled. When true, the button is not interactive.
